calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioners: wires Divino Dias and Helian Karla Monteiro Costa, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Lucas C. Dias, and with Spanish Interpreter: Vanessa Louise Teplin Jacoby.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Lucas Costa Dias.
Decree signed in open court.
